overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking along a scenic coastal path at sunset, passing through ancient harbor ruins with beached wooden ships as the light fades to dusk. The environment transitions from open cliffside to enclosed stone ruins with Nordic-style wooden vessels.

events.description: a tan goat runs past Geralt on the right side of the path heading uphill

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the coastal path with two swords strapped to his back, moving toward the harbor ruins

notable_agents.action: goat running past Geralt and continuing up the path ahead

entered.detail: tall moss-covered rock formation beside the path
snow-capped mountain peak visible on the horizon
calm ocean water reflecting the pink sunset sky
weathered wooden posts lining the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along an open coastal cliffside path during a vibrant sunset. A goat runs past him on the right, heading uphill. Large rock formations line the path while the sea stretches out to the right, reflecting purple and pink skies.

events.description: path surface changes from dirt to cobblestone as stone ruins come into view

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues walking as the environment shifts from natural coastline to ancient man-made stone structures

entered.detail: weathered stone wall ruins marking the edge of an ancient harbor
wooden Viking-style longship beached on the shore in the distance

segments.scene_description: The path transitions to cobblestone as Geralt approaches ancient harbor ruins. Stone walls appear on the right, and a large wooden longship becomes visible beached on the shore ahead. The goat is no longer in view.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient harbor ruins with beached longship

events.description: Geralt ascends stone stairs passing the large beached wooden longship on the right

agents.ego_description: Geralt climbing weathered stone stairs through the harbor ruins, passing close to the wooden ship

entered.detail: worn stone steps leading up through the ruins
rustic wooden poles and beams near the water

segments.scene_description: Geralt ascends stone stairs through the narrow harbor ruins, passing within close proximity to the massive beached longship. The sky becomes mostly obscured by the surrounding stone walls as the ambient light fades toward night.

events.description: ambient light fades significantly as dusk settles into blue hour, visibility decreases

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking up the final cobblestone approach toward the settlement visible on the hill ahead

entered.detail: wooden village houses with lit windows visible on the hillside
tall evergreen trees silhouetted against the darkening sky

segments.scene_description: Geralt approaches the settlement as darkness falls. Wooden village buildings with warm lights become visible on the left while the path continues upward through stone ruins. The sky has darkened to deep blue, and the mountain now appears centered in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a coastal path that transforms from a vibrant sunset cliffside into a darkening harbor settlement. It begins with Geralt walking past large rock formations and a running goat under a purple and pink sky, with the open sea stretching out to the right. As the terrain shifts to cobblestone, the camera approaches ancient harbor ruins where a massive wooden longship sits beached on the shore. The scene then narrows as Geralt ascends stone stairs through the ruins, causing the surrounding walls to obscure the sky while the ambient light fades toward night. Finally, the path leads toward a village of wooden buildings glowing with warm lights, set against a deep blue sky with a centered mountain in the distance.
